title: Clinician / Aesthetic Beauty Therapist (Healthcare)
description:
*Attractive Basic + High Commission + Allowance + Benefits + Training*

ClearSK® chain of medical aesthetic clinics, with locations in Singapore and international presence in Shanghai, Hangzhou, and Kuala Lumpur. This position offers an enriching environment for professional growth, facilitated by a multidisciplinary team of medical and management professionals. We seek individuals who embody our core values of speed, innovation, and adaptability, along with commitment, integrity, and professional skills.


Key Responsibilities

  • To assist and work for doctors, trained by doctors and get certified as beauty clinician.
  • To perform skin, body and/or hair analysis to customers
  • To provide valuable advices to customers in a professional manner
  • To recommend suitable treatment packages to customers
  • To perform course treatments, not limited to skin, body or hair
  • To attend to incoming calls and arranging appointments
  • To be responsible for own appointment bookings
  • Daily housekeeping and upkeep of machine conditions
  • Ensure condiments and accessories for customers are replenished at all times
  • Other administrative work as assigned by branch managers or management

Role Requirement

  • Min. requirement of Diploma or equivalent
  • Good personal hygiene and well-groomed
  • Proficient in English communication and writing.
  • Willing to work retail hours and weekends
  • Prior experiences in aesthetic / healthcare sector will be an advantage
  • Preferred qualification in "para-medical science" degree /diploma in nutrition, food science, biomedical, physiotherapy, pharmacy.
  • Cidesco / CIBTEC / ITEC / NSRS / NITEC Spa and Aesthetic Therapy, WSQ will be an advantage
  • An independent and initiative individual who plays well in team
  • Able to handle Service & Sales (S&S) orientated environment
  • Comfortable in handling IT systems and devices (i.e. Laptop, printer, mobile) for daily usage

Benefits

  • Career Progression
  • 5 Days work week + Service & Sales incentives + allowances
  • Convenient working locations
  • Medical benefits
  • Product and services benefits
  • OJT provided

Application Process:

Should you wish to be considered for shortlisting, please complete the attached Google Form at the link below prior to submitting your application on MyCareersFuture:

https://forms.gle/BANHb1kAYwBY7k6D8


Please be advised that only candidates who have completed the form and are subsequently shortlisted will be notified.

postedCompany.description: ClearSK manages the award-winning ClearSK® chain of medi-aesthetic centres with presence in Singapore, Shanghai, Hangzhou and Kuala Lumpur. As a Singapore leading aesthetics and healthcare chain, you are expected to achieve high sales and have the opportunity to collaborate closely with aesthetic doctors and clinicians. It will be a great opportunity for you to grow and learn in a multi-disciplinary environment with medical and management professionals. If you have the drive, adaptability and proven sales ability in beauty, wellness and consumer lifestyle sectors, we welcome you to apply.
postedCompany.name: CLEARSK HEALTHCARE PTE. LTD.
